title: Mosslight — A Slow Landscape Study
prompt: Instrumental only. Original warm fingerstyle acoustic guitar music for reading, quiet work, and a slow photographic landscape journey. Close, natural nylon-string guitar with soft fingerpicked patterns, gentle open-string resonance, subtle natural room air, and a very faint low ambient bed for depth. Calm, spacious, wistful but hopeful; intimate rather than cinematic. Structure: a 12-second breath-in, a simple settled guitar motif, one small harmonic opening around the middle, then a warm return and quiet release. Keep a low dynamic range and leave generous silence between phrases. No vocals, no spoken words, no drums, no percussion, no claps, no whistles, no dramatic build, no virtuoso solo, no bright lead, no abrupt change, no recognizable melody, no imitation of a specific artist or song.
